title: Links Fixed for Smoother Navigation Experience

topics.title: Code Improvements and Fixes
topics.summary: Recent merges include a fix for lint errors and type check failures, enhancing code quality. Additionally, a new Tab component was introduced, complete with tests, to improve functionality and maintainability. These updates contribute to a more robust codebase for the project.

topics.title: Community Engagement
topics.summary: The community has shown support for npmx.dev through shoutouts and contributions to collaborative projects. Posts on Bluesky highlight the positive reception and engagement from users, indicating a growing interest in the platform and its initiatives.

topics.title: Documentation Issues
topics.summary: An issue was closed regarding non-functional self-links in package READMEs, which hindered navigation. This problem affects user experience and may require further investigation to ensure all links function correctly and enhance documentation usability.
